name: build-tvos-apps
description: Build focus-first tvOS apps with SwiftUI, playback, accessibility, system-surface, and Apple TV simulator workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build, refine, and debug modern tvOS apps with SwiftUI, playback, and simulator workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Build tvOS Apps to design focus-first SwiftUI interfaces, build shelves and lockups that survive focus expansion, wire playback around AVPlayerViewController, handle Top Shelf and universal-link entry surfaces, audit accessibility and performance, and debug Apple TV apps on simulators with XcodeBuildMCP-backed flows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Design or refactor a tvOS app using focus-first SwiftUI patterns, playback best practices, system-surface integration, accessibility reviews, or Apple TV simulator debugging.
